creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Update x11-toolkits/gtk-sharp20 to the latest version (2.12.8),
	including change of MASTER_SITES (Novell's mirror is somewhat
	behind).
	This is a prerequisite for updating (and unbreaking) graphics/f-spot
	(will be send in a seperate PR).
	The patch listzed under Fix is also available at
	http://burggraben.net/hacks/x11-toolkits_gtk-sharp20_2102-2128.diff
	and a new port directory at
	http://burggraben.net/hacks/gtksharp20_port2128.tar.gz
